summary: Completed e2e frontend testing of Admin Portal migration fix. All requested features PASSED: Admin login, Staff tab with unified-staff data, Staff role filter, Logs (Call Logs, Chat Logs, Safeguarding), AI Personas, AI Usage, Monitoring, and Migration tabs all displaying data correctly.

issues: Avatar images returning 404 errors - 12 missing avatar images (from console logs). The avatars show fallback text instead.
React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique 'key' prop in table rows

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: React key prop warning on table rows - add unique key attribute to fix console warning
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Portal migration fix complete and verified. The Next.js admin portal at /app/portal runs on localhost:3001/admin. All tabs are functional: Staff displays unified staff data from /api/admin/unified-staff with names, emails, roles (admin/supervisor/counsellor/peer) and statuses. Role filter working. Logs tab shows Call Logs, Chat Logs, and Safeguarding alerts (73 alerts visible). AI Personas shows 12 characters with descriptions. AI Usage shows token/cost data. Monitoring shows system stats. Migration shows legacy vs unified counts.

staff_tab_with_data.details: Staff table displays multiple staff members with names, emails, roles, statuses. Shows source as '(unified)'. Includes admin, peer, counsellor, supervisor roles.

staff_role_filter.details: Role filter dropdown works - tested All Roles, Counsellor, Peer filters

logs_call_logs.details: Call Logs tab displays 6 call records with Date/Time, Contact Name, Type (counsellor/peer), Method (phone/webrtc), Phone

logs_chat_logs.details: Chat Logs tab displays chat rooms with Date, Room ID, Staff, Status (active), Messages count

logs_safeguarding.details: Safeguarding tab displays 73 alerts with Date, User, Risk Level (RED/AMBER), Trigger, Status (active/acknowledged/case_created)

ai_personas.details: AI Personas tab displays 12 AI character cards with names, descriptions, enabled/disabled status, and order numbers. Characters include: Megan, Penny, Frankie, Tommy, Rachel, Bob, Finch, Jack, Margie, Rita, Catherine, Baz

ai_usage.details: AI Usage tab displays Total Tokens (17,269), Total Cost (£0.0021), Providers section with OpenAI breakdown

monitoring.details: Monitoring tab displays 4 metrics: Active Calls (0), Active Chats (0), Staff Online (0), Pending Alerts (0)

migration.details: Migration tab displays Database Migration Status with Legacy Users (20), Legacy Counsellors (15), Legacy Peers (4), Unified Staff (0), status badge 'Migration Pending', and action buttons

api_endpoints_verified./api/admin/unified-staff: PASS - Returns combined staff data from legacy sources
